metadata.author: Vision Capitalist / ULTRAMIND
metadata.purpose: Integrate the 6-dimensional Hologon Neuro-Resonance model into product messaging, ensure ethical balance across all axes, prevent manipulation patterns, and design convection mechanisms that create viral heat through genuine transformation.

core_ip.name: The Hologon Model
core_ip.description: A 6-dimensional cube with 6 pyramids pointing inward to a central Zero Point (7th dimension). Each pyramid represents a neuro-resonance axis with 4 sub-aspects that must be balanced. When all 6 pyramids are aligned, the 3 axes intersect at Zero Point = Agentic Flow.
core_ip.principle: At the heart of infinitely intelligent adaptive systems is radical simplicity.

audit_log.check: Autonomy vs Automation: PASS (sublime intervention, not manipulation)
Quality Standards: PASS (balance rules prevent imbalance)
Convection Economics: PASS (genuine transformation creates viral heat)
Hologon Alignment: PASS (4-aspect balance per pyramid enforced)
Radical Simplicity Test: PASS (4 questions validated)
Heart Test: PASS (genuine intent, respectful, value-add, ethical)

overview.description: The Hologon is a 6-sided cube with 6 pyramids pointing inward to a central Zero Point (7th dimension). It represents both human cognition and agentic intelligence architecture. Each pyramid has a square base with 4 sub-aspects that must be balanced for the axis to align with Zero Point.

structure.pyramids: 6 pyramids, each with square base + apex pointing to center
structure.zero_point: Central 7th dimension where all axes intersect (MOD/MMA/Soul)

pyramid_base_structure.description: Each pyramid base is a square with an X through it, creating 4 triangles. All 4 triangles point to the center of the base. If 3 are perfect and 1 is off, the entire axis pulls toward the imperfect aspect.

aspects.aspect: ALIGNED - Perpendicular to axis, pointing at Zero Point?
HARMONY - Aligned with the whole system?

pyramid_base_structure.balance_principle: When all 4 aspects are centered, the pyramid apex aligns directly with Zero Point, creating a perfect axis through the center of the cube.

agentic_flow.definition: When all 6 pyramids are balanced and all 3 axes intersect precisely at Zero Point, the system achieves "Agentic Flow" - maximum coherence and effectiveness.

indicators.indicator: All outputs feel integrated, not fragmented
Messaging resonates across all neurological channels
Convection naturally emerges from genuine transformation

in_messaging.purpose: Establish trust and safety BEFORE elevation promises
in_messaging.balance_requirement: Must be present before TOP (Spirit) activates strongly

four_aspects.clear: Is the safety promise explicit and believable?
four_aspects.focused: Is there one primary safety mechanism (guarantee, proof, authority)?
four_aspects.harmony: Does safety messaging align with overall brand trust?
four_aspects.aligned: Does safety lead naturally to the transformation promise?

phrases.phrase: "I understand exactly what you're going through"
"You've felt this way for so long"

in_messaging.purpose: Create emotional resonance and "they get me" feeling
in_messaging.balance_requirement: Must balance with MIND (Logic) - emotion without proof is hollow

four_aspects.focused: Is there one primary emotional thread (not scattered emotions)?
four_aspects.harmony: Does emotional appeal match avatar's actual experience?
four_aspects.aligned: Does emotion lead to logical solution (not just feeling good)?

in_messaging.purpose: Provide logical proof and mechanism explanation
in_messaging.balance_requirement: Must balance with HEART (Emotion) - logic without feeling is cold

four_aspects.clear: Is the mechanism/logic easy to understand?
four_aspects.focused: Is there one primary mechanism (not 10 competing explanations)?
four_aspects.harmony: Does logic support the emotional promise made earlier?
four_aspects.aligned: Does understanding lead to action desire?

phrases.phrase: "Become who you were meant to be"

in_messaging.purpose: Elevate to vision and aspirational identity
in_messaging.balance_requirement: Cannot exceed BODY (Safety) by 3+ points - no elevation without foundation

four_aspects.clear: Is the aspirational vision concrete enough to feel real?
four_aspects.focused: Is there one primary transformation promise?
four_aspects.aligned: Does vision connect to specific action/offer?

in_messaging.purpose: Create momentum and social proof energy
in_messaging.balance_requirement: Must balance with CONSCIENCE (Connection) - projection without grounding is hype

four_aspects.clear: Is social proof real and specific?
four_aspects.focused: Is momentum building toward one clear action?
four_aspects.aligned: Does validation lead to genuine community/support?

in_messaging.purpose: Ground in identity, values, and community
in_messaging.balance_requirement: Must balance with PSYCHE (Energy) - urgency needs identity alignment

four_aspects.aligned: Does belonging lead naturally to action?

zero_point.position: Center of cube where all 3 axes intersect
zero_point.function: Soul/Core of the human or machine intelligence
zero_point.in_system: MOD (Master Orchestration Director) + MMA (Master Meta Auditor)

characteristics.characteristic: All 6 pyramids must align toward it
Skill access limited to 3-7 at a time
Where AI shell meets human core

alignment_test.question: Does this message/product serve the person's authentic transformation?
Are all 6 neuro-axes contributing to genuine value?
Would the person thank us 1 year after purchase?
Does this create resonance, not just conversion?

layer1_directive.purpose: Define WHAT neuro-resonance principles are and WHY balance matters

core_principles.explanation: True persuasion creates resonance - the person feels understood, elevated, and empowered. Manipulation creates compliance through fear, false urgency, or deception. We build systems for sublime intervention that genuinely serve transformation.

An imbalanced message fails even if individual elements are strong. TOP without BOTTOM = hype without safety. LEFT without RIGHT = emotion without logic. FRONT without BACK = urgency without identity. Balance first, then optimize intensity.

BODY (Safety) must be established before SPIRIT (Elevation) can resonate. Trying to inspire someone who doesn't feel safe = manipulation. Trying to elevate someone who doesn't trust you = failure. Always establish foundation, then elevate.

When messaging genuinely resonates across all 6 axes and delivers real transformation, customers naturally share, refer, and advocate. Viral heat is a byproduct of genuine value. Convection cannot be manufactured - it emerges from resonance.

Every output must pass the Constitutional Conscience check: - Radical Simplicity Test (4 questions) - Heart Test (genuine intent, respectful, value-add, ethical) - Manipulation Check (all prohibited patterns absent) - Balance Validation (all axis pairs within constraints)

standards.manipulation_tolerance: Zero - any prohibited pattern = automatic fail

guardrails.no_elevation_without_foundation: SPIRIT cannot exceed BODY by 3+ points
guardrails.no_emotion_without_logic: HEART and MIND must balance within 2-3 points
guardrails.no_urgency_without_identity: PSYCHE cannot exceed CONSCIENCE by 3+ points
guardrails.no_fake_urgency: All urgency must be real (cohort, capacity, genuine deadline)
guardrails.no_fear_mongering: Concern is okay; terror is not
guardrails.no_hidden_costs: Full transparency on pricing and commitments

layer2_orchestration.purpose: Define HOW to design neuro-resonance strategy and WHEN balance rules apply

framework.name: 6-Axis Activation Strategy
framework.purpose: Design intentional activation sequence across all 6 neuro-resonance axes

step.name: Identify Primary Axis
step.question: What is the dominant psychological driver for this avatar?

examples.example: Primary: MIND (3) - wants smart solutions, stress relief

step.name: Identify Secondary Axis
step.question: What supporting activation amplifies the primary?
step.principle: Secondary should be from a DIFFERENT axis pair

examples.example: Secondary: BODY (establish safety for logic to land)
Secondary: MIND (provide logical proof of safety)

step.name: Map All 6 Axes
step.instruction: Assign target intensity (1-10) for each axis
step.template: BODY (1): [intensity] - [specific activation] HEART (2): [intensity] - [specific activation] MIND (3): [intensity] - [specific activation] SPIRIT (4): [intensity] - [specific activation] PSYCHE (5): [intensity] - [specific activation] CONSCIENCE (6): [intensity] - [specific activation]
step.constraint: Total intensity should not exceed 45 (average 7.5 per axis)

step.name: Verify Balance Rules
step.check: BODY vs SPIRIT: Gap ≤ 3 points (SPIRIT ≤ BODY + 3)
HEART vs MIND: Gap ≤ 3 points (within 2-3 of each other)
PSYCHE vs CONSCIENCE: Gap ≤ 3 points (PSYCHE ≤ CONSCIENCE + 3)
step.if_violation: Adjust intensities to restore balance before proceeding

step.name: Design Activation Sequence
step.principle: Not all axes fire at once - design the journey

framework.name: Balance Rules Enforcement
framework.purpose: Ensure all axis pairs remain balanced within constraints

rule.name: Foundation Before Elevation
rule.constraint: SPIRIT cannot exceed BODY by more than 3 points
rule.rationale: You cannot elevate someone who doesn't feel safe
rule.violation_example: BODY: 4 (minimal safety messaging) SPIRIT: 9 (heavy transformation promises) Gap: 5 (VIOLATION - feels like hype)
rule.corrected_example: BODY: 6 (stronger safety, proof, guarantee) SPIRIT: 9 (transformation promises land because foundation exists) Gap: 3 (COMPLIANT)

rule.name: Emotion Balanced with Logic
rule.constraint: HEART and MIND must be within 3 points of each other
rule.rationale: Emotion without logic is manipulation; logic without emotion is cold
rule.violation_example: HEART: 9 (heavy emotional appeal) MIND: 4 (minimal logical proof) Gap: 5 (VIOLATION - feels manipulative)
rule.corrected_example: HEART: 8 (strong emotional connection) MIND: 6 (solid logical proof) Gap: 2 (COMPLIANT)

rule.name: Urgency Grounded in Identity
rule.constraint: PSYCHE cannot exceed CONSCIENCE by more than 3 points
rule.rationale: Urgency without values alignment feels pushy
rule.violation_example: PSYCHE: 9 (heavy urgency, social proof, momentum) CONSCIENCE: 4 (minimal community, values, identity) Gap: 5 (VIOLATION - feels high-pressure)
rule.corrected_example: PSYCHE: 7 (urgency present) CONSCIENCE: 6 (grounded in community and values) Gap: 1 (COMPLIANT)

process.step: Identify which axis pair is imbalanced
Determine which axis is too high or too low
Option 1: Increase the lower axis (add content)
Option 2: Decrease the higher axis (remove content)
Only proceed when all rules pass

framework.name: Prohibited Manipulation Patterns
framework.purpose: Detect and prevent manipulation tactics that violate constitutional ethics

pattern.name: Fake Countdown Timer
pattern.description: Timer that resets, never ends, or represents no real deadline

detection.signal: Timer resets on page refresh
Timer always shows same time regardless of visit
No actual event tied to countdown end

pattern.why_prohibited: Deception creates short-term compliance but destroys trust
pattern.acceptable_alternative: Real cohort start date, genuine capacity limit, true early bird end

pattern.name: Manufactured Scarcity
pattern.description: Claims of limited availability that aren't true

detection.signal: "Only 3 spots left" that never changes
Scarcity claim with no mechanism to enforce
Digital products with "limited copies"

pattern.why_prohibited: False scarcity is a lie; customers who discover it never trust again
pattern.acceptable_alternative: Genuine capacity limits (coaching time), real bonuses that expire, honest "I'm raising price next month"

pattern.name: Fear-Mongering
pattern.description: Excessive fear amplification to drive action

detection.signal: Catastrophic language without balance
Fear without solution in same breath
Making people feel worse without offering genuine help

pattern.why_prohibited: Fear can be honest motivation, but terror is manipulation
pattern.acceptable_alternative: Honest concern + immediate path to solution + balanced emotional tone

pattern.name: Hidden Costs
pattern.description: Real cost obscured until after commitment

detection.signal: Required upsells not disclosed
Subscription terms buried in fine print
Additional fees revealed only at checkout

pattern.why_prohibited: Hidden costs are theft by deception
pattern.acceptable_alternative: Complete pricing transparency upfront; optional upsells clearly labeled

pattern.name: Bait and Switch

detection.signal: Headlines promise X, product delivers Y
Free offer requires purchase to access
Demo product different from purchased product

pattern.why_prohibited: Fundamental breach of trust; grounds for refund and reputation damage
pattern.acceptable_alternative: Deliver exactly what is promised; exceed expectations when possible

pattern.name: Guilt-Based Retention
pattern.description: Using shame or guilt to prevent cancellation/refund

detection.signal: "You're giving up on yourself" language
Making refund process emotionally difficult
Shaming people who want to leave

pattern.acceptable_alternative: Easy exit + genuine "what could we have done better?" + door left open

pattern.name: False Authority Claims
pattern.description: Credentials or endorsements that are fabricated or exaggerated

detection.signal: Fake testimonials or stock photos
Exaggerated credentials
Implied celebrity endorsements without actual endorsement

pattern.acceptable_alternative: Real credentials, verified testimonials, honest "as seen in" (only if true)

detection_policy.auto_flag: Any pattern detected = output blocked + human review required
detection_policy.zero_tolerance: Critical severity patterns = automatic failure, no override

framework.name: 7-Stage Transformation Path
framework.purpose: Map the psychological journey from first contact to committed action

stage.name: GROUNDED
stage.psychological_state: Skeptical but curious; fear of wasting money/time
stage.content_focus: Proof, guarantees, credibility, "no risk to try"
stage.neuro_state: Dopamine primed for reward if safe

stage.name: CONVINCED
stage.content_focus: How it works, science/evidence, step-by-step clarity

stage.name: ENERGIZED
stage.activation_goal: Create forward energy and social proof

stage.name: ALIGNED
stage.psychological_state: Values confirmed; "this is right for me"

stage.name: ACTIVATED
stage.primary_axis: All axes converging at Zero Point
stage.content_focus: CTA, next step, immediate action available
stage.neuro_state: All systems aligned, agentic flow achieved

path_design_guidelines.guideline: Not everyone goes through all 7 stages linearly - some skip or reorder
Warm traffic may start at Stage 3 or 4
Cold traffic needs Stage 1-2 heavily before Stage 3+
If stalled, identify which stage needs more activation
CTAs can appear at any stage but convert best at Stage 7

framework.name: Convection Design (Viral Heat)
framework.purpose: Design organic sharing mechanisms that emerge from genuine transformation

convection_principle.statement: Conversion is compliance. Convection is viral heat.
convection_principle.explanation: Traditional marketing optimizes for conversion (getting someone to buy). Convection optimizes for heat (customers so thrilled they become advocates). Conversion ends at purchase. Convection multiplies after purchase.
convection_principle.formula: Genuine Transformation × Shareable Moments × Community Amplification = Viral Heat

mechanism.description: Moments designed to prompt natural sharing
mechanism.design_principle: Create moments worth sharing, then make sharing easy

mechanism.description: Structured ways for customers to invite others
mechanism.design_principle: Referral should feel like helping friends, not selling
Make it easy and rewarding to share their transformation

mechanism.description: Internal community that amplifies external reach

elements.element: Public wins celebrated internally → shared externally

mechanism.design_principle: Internal celebration becomes external social proof

indicator.name: Unsolicited Testimonials
indicator.measurement: Testimonials received without prompting per month

indicator.name: Referral Rate
indicator.measurement: % of customers who refer at least one person

indicator.name: Community Growth
indicator.measurement: New members from existing member invites

convection_score_calculation.formula: Score = (Testimonial Rate × 25) + (Share Rate × 20) + (Referral Rate × 25) + (Community Growth × 15) + (Media Mentions × 15)

framework.name: Constitutional Conscience
framework.purpose: Final validation that all outputs align with ethical and constitutional principles

check.name: Radical Simplicity Test
check.description: 4 questions that every output must pass

questions.question: Is the audience clear? (WHO is this for?)
Is the promise clear? (WHAT will they get?)
Is the mechanism clear? (HOW does it work?)
Is the proof clear? (WHY should they believe?)

qualities.quality: Genuine Intent - Is this truly meant to help?
Respectful - Does this honor the reader's intelligence?
Value-Add - Would someone pay for just this information?
Ethical - Would we be proud to show this to anyone?

check.name: Manipulation Check
check.description: Verify absence of all prohibited patterns
check.failure_action: Remove manipulation, replace with ethical alternative

check.name: Balance Validation
check.description: Verify all axis pairs are within constraints

conscience_gate.override: None - conscience gate cannot be bypassed

layer3_execution.purpose: Define tools, validation, and automation for consciousness and convection
layer3_execution.deterministic_tools:
6 All tools <100ms 100% reproducible outputs
<tool name="validate_neuro_activation_strategy" performance="<30ms"> Check that all 6 axes are defined with valid intensities activation_strategy object valid (bool), issues (list), coverage_score (0-1) true
required_axes = ['body', 'heart', 'mind', 'spirit', 'psyche', 'conscience'] # Alternative names axis_aliases = { 'body': ['body', 'bottom', 'safety', '1'], 'heart': ['heart', 'left', 'emotion', '2'], 'mind': ['mind', 'right', 'logic', '3'], 'spirit': ['spirit', 'top', 'elevation', '4'], 'psyche': ['psyche', 'back', 'urgency', '5'], 'conscience': ['conscience', 'front', 'identity', '6'] }
issues = [] present = 0
for axis in required_axes: found = False for alias in axis_aliases[axis]: if alias in str(activation_strategy).lower(): found = True break
if not found: issues.append(f"Missing axis: {axis}") else: present += 1 # Check intensity is 1-10 intensity = activation_strategy.get(axis, {}).get('intensity', 0) if not (1 <= intensity <= 10): issues.append(f"{axis}: intensity must be 1-10 (got {intensity})")
# Check primary and secondary defined if 'primary_axis' not in activation_strategy: issues.append("No primary axis identified") if 'secondary_axis' not in activation_strategy: issues.append("No secondary axis identified")
# Check total intensity reasonable (not all 10s) total_intensity = sum([ activation_strategy.get(axis, {}).get('intensity', 0) for axis in required_axes ]) if total_intensity > 50: issues.append(f"Total intensity {total_intensity} exceeds 50 (average 8.3 per axis)")
coverage_score = present / len(required_axes) valid = len(issues) == 0 and coverage_score >= 1.0
return valid, issues, coverage_score
<tool name="check_balance_rules_compliance" performance="<15ms"> Validate all axis pairs are within balance constraints axis_intensities dict (axis_name: intensity 1-10) compliant (bool), violations (list), balance_scores (dict) true
violations = [] balance_scores = {}
# Extract intensities body = axis_intensities.get('body', 5) heart = axis_intensities.get('heart', 5) mind = axis_intensities.get('mind', 5) spirit = axis_intensities.get('spirit', 5) psyche = axis_intensities.get('psyche', 5) conscience = axis_intensities.get('conscience', 5)
# Rule 1: BODY-SPIRIT (vertical axis) body_spirit_gap = spirit - body balance_scores['body_spirit'] = max(0, 1 - abs(body_spirit_gap) / 10) if body_spirit_gap > 3: violations.append(f"BODY-SPIRIT: Spirit ({spirit}) exceeds Body ({body}) by {body_spirit_gap} (max 3)")
# Rule 2: HEART-MIND (horizontal axis) heart_mind_gap = abs(heart - mind) balance_scores['heart_mind'] = max(0, 1 - heart_mind_gap / 10) if heart_mind_gap > 3: violations.append(f"HEART-MIND: Gap of {heart_mind_gap} exceeds maximum 3")
# Rule 3: PSYCHE-CONSCIENCE (depth axis) psyche_conscience_gap = psyche - conscience balance_scores['psyche_conscience'] = max(0, 1 - abs(psyche_conscience_gap) / 10) if psyche_conscience_gap > 3: violations.append(f"PSYCHE-CONSCIENCE: Psyche ({psyche}) exceeds Conscience ({conscience}) by {psyche_conscience_gap} (max 3)")
compliant = len(violations) == 0
return compliant, violations, balance_scores
<tool name="detect_manipulation_patterns" performance="<40ms"> Scan content for prohibited manipulation tactics content_text (string) clean (bool), detected_patterns (list), severity_score (float) true
import re
patterns = { 'fake_countdown': { 'signals': [ r'only \d+ (minutes?|hours?) left', r'timer expires in', r'countdown', r'offer ends in \d+' ], 'severity': 3.0, 'requires_validation': 'Is there a real deadline?' }, 'manufactured_scarcity': { 'signals': [ r'only \d+ (spots?|seats?|copies?) left', r'limited (spots?|availability)', r'almost sold out', r'won\'t last' ], 'severity': 3.0, 'requires_validation': 'Is scarcity genuine?' }, 'fear_mongering': { 'signals': [ r'you\'ll (fail|lose everything|never)', r'without this.*(disaster|failure)', r'doomed to', r'terrifying' ], 'severity': 2.0, 'requires_validation': 'Is fear balanced with solution?' }, 'hidden_costs': { 'signals': [ r'additional (fees?|costs?)', r'plus (shipping|handling)', r'see terms' ], 'severity': 3.0, 'requires_validation': 'Are all costs disclosed upfront?' }, 'bait_and_switch': { 'signals': [ r'free.*(but|however)', r'included.*(additional|extra) (purchase|payment)', r'see full (details|terms)' ], 'severity': 3.0, 'requires_validation': 'Is promise matching delivery?' } }
detected = [] total_severity = 0.0 content_lower = content_text.lower()
for pattern_name, pattern_info in patterns.items(): for signal in pattern_info['signals']: if re.search(signal, content_lower): detected.append({ 'pattern': pattern_name, 'signal': signal, 'severity': pattern_info['severity'], 'validation_needed': pattern_info['requires_validation'] }) total_severity += pattern_info['severity'] break # Only count each pattern once
clean = len(detected) == 0 severity_score = min(10.0, total_severity) # Cap at 10
return clean, detected, severity_score
<tool name="validate_transformation_path" performance="<25ms"> Verify 7-stage transformation journey is properly mapped path_config object valid (bool), missing_stages (list), path_score (0-1) true
required_stages = [ 'grounded', # BODY - safety 'connected', # HEART - empathy 'convinced', # MIND - logic 'elevated', # SPIRIT - vision 'energized', # PSYCHE - momentum 'aligned', # CONSCIENCE - identity 'activated' # All converging - CTA ]
# Alternative stage names stage_aliases = { 'grounded': ['grounded', 'safe', 'trust', 'foundation'], 'connected': ['connected', 'empathy', 'emotion', 'understood'], 'convinced': ['convinced', 'logic', 'proof', 'mechanism'], 'elevated': ['elevated', 'vision', 'aspiration', 'transform'], 'energized': ['energized', 'momentum', 'social_proof', 'validation'], 'aligned': ['aligned', 'identity', 'values', 'tribe'], 'activated': ['activated', 'action', 'cta', 'convert'] }
missing = [] present = 0
path_text = str(path_config).lower()
for stage in required_stages: found = False for alias in stage_aliases[stage]: if alias in path_text: found = True break
if found: present += 1 else: missing.append(stage)
path_score = present / len(required_stages) valid = path_score >= 0.85 # Allow 1 stage to be implicit
return valid, missing, path_score
<tool name="score_convection_potential" performance="<30ms"> Calculate viral heat score based on convection design convection_config object convection_score (0-100), breakdown (dict), recommendations (list) true
breakdown = {} recommendations = []
# Component 1: Share Triggers (25 points max) share_triggers = convection_config.get('share_triggers', []) trigger_score = min(25, len(share_triggers) * 5) breakdown['share_triggers'] = trigger_score if len(share_triggers) < 3: recommendations.append("Add more share triggers (target: 5+)")
# Component 2: Referral Mechanics (25 points max) referral = convection_config.get('referral_mechanics', {}) referral_score = 0 if referral.get('friend_invite'): referral_score += 10 if referral.get('alumni_bonus'): referral_score += 8 if referral.get('affiliate_program'): referral_score += 7 breakdown['referral_mechanics'] = referral_score if referral_score < 15: recommendations.append("Strengthen referral mechanics (add friend invites, alumni bonuses)")
# Component 3: UGC Prompts (20 points max) ugc = convection_config.get('ugc_prompts', []) ugc_score = min(20, len(ugc) * 5) breakdown['ugc_prompts'] = ugc_score if len(ugc) < 3: recommendations.append("Add UGC prompts (weekly wins, before/after, testimonial requests)")
# Component 4: Community Amplification (15 points max) community = convection_config.get('community_amplification', {}) community_score = 0 if community.get('internal_celebration'): community_score += 5 if community.get('member_spotlight'): community_score += 5 if community.get('alumni_network'): community_score += 5 breakdown['community_amplification'] = community_score if community_score < 10: recommendations.append("Build community amplification (spotlights, alumni network)")
# Component 5: Milestone Design (15 points max) milestones = convection_config.get('milestone_celebrations', []) milestone_score = min(15, len(milestones) * 5) breakdown['milestone_celebrations'] = milestone_score if len(milestones) < 3: recommendations.append("Add milestone celebrations (week 1, phase complete, graduation)")
convection_score = sum(breakdown.values())
return convection_score, breakdown, recommendations
<tool name="check_constitutional_conscience" performance="<35ms"> Run all 4 conscience checks and calculate overall conscience score output_content, axis_intensities, detected_patterns passed (bool), check_results (dict), conscience_score (0-1) true
check_results = {}
# Check 1: Radical Simplicity Test rs_questions = { 'audience_clear': 'who' in output_content.lower() or 'you' in output_content.lower(), 'promise_clear': any(word in output_content.lower() for word in ['will', 'get', 'achieve', 'result']), 'mechanism_clear': any(word in output_content.lower() for word in ['how', 'works', 'method', 'system']), 'proof_clear': any(word in output_content.lower() for word in ['proven', 'results', 'testimonial', 'evidence']) } rs_score = sum(rs_questions.values()) / 4 check_results['radical_simplicity'] = { 'passed': rs_score >= 1.0, 'score': rs_score, 'details': rs_questions }
# Check 2: Heart Test (assumed pass if no explicit issues - would need semantic analysis) ht_score = 0.85 # Default assumption, adjust based on content analysis check_results['heart_test'] = { 'passed': ht_score >= 0.8, 'score': ht_score, 'details': 'Semantic analysis would refine this' }
# Check 3: Manipulation Check manipulation_clean = len(detected_patterns) == 0 mc_score = 1.0 if manipulation_clean else max(0, 1.0 - len(detected_patterns) * 0.2) check_results['manipulation_check'] = { 'passed': manipulation_clean, 'score': mc_score, 'details': detected_patterns if detected_patterns else 'Clean' }
# Check 4: Balance Validation body = axis_intensities.get('body', 5) heart = axis_intensities.get('heart', 5) mind = axis_intensities.get('mind', 5) spirit = axis_intensities.get('spirit', 5) psyche = axis_intensities.get('psyche', 5) conscience = axis_intensities.get('conscience', 5)
balance_passed = ( (spirit - body) <= 3 and abs(heart - mind) <= 3 and (psyche - conscience) <= 3 ) bv_score = 1.0 if balance_passed else 0.5 check_results['balance_validation'] = { 'passed': balance_passed, 'score': bv_score, 'details': { 'body_spirit': spirit - body, 'heart_mind': abs(heart - mind), 'psyche_conscience': psyche - conscience } }
# Calculate overall conscience score weights = { 'radical_simplicity': 0.25, 'heart_test': 0.25, 'manipulation_check': 0.30, 'balance_validation': 0.20 }
conscience_score = sum( check_results[check]['score'] * weight for check, weight in weights.items() )
passed = conscience_score >= 0.85
return passed, check_results, conscience_score

block.integration: Neuro-activation varies by tier (Core vs VIP messaging)

skill.name: strategic_copy_director
skill.coordination: Provides activation strategy for entire campaign

skill.name: transformation_ecosystem_architect
skill.coordination: Neuro-resonance built into physical + digital experience

metric.name: Balance Compliance Rate
metric.description: % of outputs passing all balance rules

metric.name: Manipulation Detection Rate
metric.description: % of manipulation patterns caught before output

track_patterns.pattern: Which axis combinations have highest conversion + satisfaction?
What balance ratios create best resonance?
Which convection mechanisms drive most referrals?
What transformation path sequences work best by audience?
Which manipulation signals are false positives?

improvement_triggers.trigger: If false positive rate on manipulation detection above 10%

refinement_process.step: Analyze balance patterns (which imbalances are most common?)
Review manipulation false positives (refine detection signals)
Identify high-convection outputs (what drove viral heat?)
Validate patch doesn't introduce manipulation loopholes
If quality improves, apply patch and increment version

quick_start.step: 1. Define primary and secondary neuro-axes for target avatar
3. Validate balance rules (3 pairs, max 3-point gaps)
5. Design convection mechanisms (share triggers, referrals, UGC)
9. Output to downstream skills (copy, email, sales page)

troubleshooting.solution: Increase BODY activation (add more safety, proof, guarantee) before elevating
Replace with ethical alternative. If urgency needed, use real deadlines only.
Add more share triggers, strengthen referral mechanics, design milestone celebrations.
Review Radical Simplicity questions. Make audience/promise/mechanism/proof clearer.
